details.address: 9826 Sandy Rock Pl Suite B, Charlotte, NC 28277

raw_data.address: 9826 Sandy Rock Pl Suite B, Charlotte, NC 28277
raw_data.name: Milk Cha-Cha
raw_data.typical_time_spent: People typically spend 10 min to 2 hr here

reviews_data.review_text:
MilkChacha never disappoints! Their tea is so flavorful and you can really tell they use high-quality ingredients. The tea base tastes fresh and authentic, not watered down like some other places.

They’re also super generous with toppings — every sip had plenty of boba and add-ons. Everything was cooked perfectly and tasted fresh.

If you’re a bubble tea lover, this place is definitely worth trying. Great drinks, great quality, and always consistent!
Great little spot. Never tried Boba before and it was so good. The two girls working tonight were so sweet. Highly recommend.
Absolutely delicious boba tea! My typical go to is the mango yakult with strawberry popping boba at 50% sweetness, but I've never been disappointed with anything I've ordered!

Boba was good.
We went like 2 minutes before closing.
Folks were kind enough to make us few drinks.
Thanks to them.
Trying to order thru their web. But it won't allow it or let me. Did it once I don't want to use Dd or postmaster or any other website than theirs. Ugh
The Hong Kong Milk Tea was straight up tea and nothing more.  It had no taste.  A true watered down disappointment!
A very disappointing experience. I ordered a hot black sesame latte and it was basically milk. They also up-charged for it to be hot, only for my drink to be lukewarm. Lukewarm milk and no boba.😞
Not interested in card only businesses.
The Brown Sugar Milk Swirl is amazing. It is consistently good and my drink is always made extremely fast!
So upset from this experience. For the size of the cup there was barely any boba or enough brown sugar syrup. It was basically milk with a slight flavour. And I drove far out to get there. Do better!

these kids working here didn’t let my 8month pregnant self use the bathroom….?? Saying it’s for employees only? Hello use common sense you’re serving food and drinks you need to let people use the bathroom!!! And after telling you I’m pregnant? Pls retrain with common sense!!!

been here 10ish times, authentic rich tea, fav boba (soaked in brown sugar & chewy), vast & best fruit tea variety (trust, ik), option to pay for extra matcha or ube scoops, and favs are rose oolong tea (not milk tea) and ube latte.

Just went in and experienced terrible customer service. Was placing an order for 3 drinks and one had a sesame and peanut allergy so I simply asked them if that was ok and she said “I think so” and I said are you 100% sure that there will be no cross contamination with anything and they simply shrugged and said “no I can’t be sure.” Then I asked if they could possibly contact a manager to ask (either by text or phone call because a manager was not present in store) and they said they couldn’t. Then, to clarify (because I wasn’t sure if it was a matter of the employees just not understanding), I asked if they could just use new utensils and a new blender when making the drink with allergies and again they shrugged and said no. The employee was genuinely just being so rude and held an attitude the whole. The drinks were good tho but we had to cancel the order with allergies.
got the taro milk tea and it was delicious! staff was super friendly. also we won at the claw machine and it was a really fun experience.
Really good boba! Nice and kind workers
We asked for 25% sugar, but it seemed like the flavor was also cut to 25%. Both of our drinks tasted like watered down milk with a hint of tea flavor. Very disappointed ☹️
Easy and good. Nice staff.
They gypped me on the flavor/syrup. Just served me a glass of milk with boba. Ordered the mango milk swirl tea, and barely got a single sip of very mild mango flavor. Disgusting.
Best Bobah in Charlotte!!! Taro slush is amazing and Hong Kong !!

The drinks was tasty, and the kids liked it, but there was an unpleasant situation — the kids weren’t given $7 in change because like they have a rule that they don’t give change. It felt like they were deceived, which is very unfair and mean, especially towards children. Please pay attention to such behavior and make sure this doesn’t happen again!

The boba here is really hard, maybe it’s been frozen and thawed too many times over but I didn’t like it I kept spitting it out to see if there was something hard or crunchy in the pearls. The milk tea flavors are strong and good but this last time I noticed it was a little watered down, even though I get it with no ice. That’s not really a big deal though my biggest problem was the hard boba balls. There was yellow crust inside of one and I saved it to take a picture but I can’t find it. I did take a cute picture here at least!

Boba saved my life. Thats right you’re reading this correctly. The lady who works the front desk, her name was Alessa if I remember correctly, saved my life. I was comatose in my bed for 5 months then woke up by sheer miracle. There was only one thing on my mind: I have to get boba. I drove around aimlessly with no purpose in life, until, I FOUND THE BOBA JOINT FROM MY DREAMS!!! This waitress has a poetry in motion!!!!!!!!!! DRINKS 10/10 BOBA 10/10 Ever since I have been waking up with excitement everyday, the sparkle has returned to my eye, all thanks to the kind lady working the boba shop, Alessa. 🧋🧋🧋

The drinks were tasty but the boba pearls were hard and chewy. To me, boba is a part of the experience and has to be good. The service was good. There is like two tables in the store and may be a table for two outside. The store was pretty clean.
All the drinks tasted great except for the Thai Milk tea. It was strongly flavored Thai Tea. Had the boba been softer, this place would have been one of my favorites.
They have really good Boba
As always, the best brown sugar boba milk I've ever had, and trust me, I've tried a lot.

I had a terrible experience today with the staff . Vania was extremely unpleasant in her attitude and approach. She was very standoffish and downright aggressive and rude which resulted in me never wanting to go to this establishment which I had looked forward to daily . You lost a long time customer . I asked for a refund as I no longer felt comfortable in our interactions she proceeded to give me the wrong email which I had her write down so that I could not contact owners to receive refund . I would like ownership to call me regarding my experience today.

Great boba place in the South Charlotte area! Highly recommend the Hong Kong Milk Tea. The packaging is very cute and convenient to carry on the go. Location is also convenient and accessible. The claw machine looks like fun and there is a lot of cute merch on display for sale. Service is fast and extremely welcoming. The menu is very diverse and varied.

Amazing boba, and this is my favorite boba place along with Gong Cha :) The decor is cute and fun, and the boba has lots of interesting add ins and flavors!! There is also a fun claw machine to get plushies and you can also buy plushies as well. I got the mango tornado with lychee jelly and it tasted great!! ☺️
Best Boba around. My children love this place, playing uno, exploding kittens, Jenga, or listening to the music. Even has a claw machine!

Customer service was terrible. They charge extra for boba and put very little boba in the cups we ordered, and when I asked for extra boba, the lady said she would need to charge extra for it while she had already charged for the little boba that she put in our cups to begin with. I have never had that experience in any other boba place. I didn’t appreciate the exchange and won’t be going here again. Highly recommend you find yourself another place where they don’t nickel and dime you.
Great place to spend time and hang out! Love the mango matcha latte it’s absolutely amazing!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi, i apologize for this bad experience and it should’ve not have happened. Can you please email us the description if the girl that you interacted with to milkchachaclt2@gmail.com? This way we can implement disciplinary actions. Again we sincerely apologize and we will look into this matter immediately. Thank you for your support and understanding.
reviews_data.review_text: Service was poor, no hello or anything. The girl behind the desk seriously lacked at making the place feel welcoming. Barely any eye contact was made and when I had to return a drink because I found a hair in it they were annoyed that they had to make another one 💀
The girls there were so nice and definitely some of the BEST Thai tea I’ve had in a while you could tell the boba was fresh too!! 🧋💅🏻
Brown sugar milk swirl is the best! Their claw machine is pretty cool too!
Love this location as well! Super soft boba and awesome tea flavor
Great spot for Boba. I got the Taro Slush and the Jasmine Green Tea w/ Lychee and Boba! Absolutely amazing drinks.
So many delicious flavor options here! They have plenty of cold and hot drinks, and if you're not familiar with some, the friendly staff are always more than happy to help!
been coming here since the rea farms location opened, extremely fun and calm place with rlly nice boba 🤍🤍
Delicious hongkong milk bubble Tea and friendly staff !

The girls working there were so friendly. In total I spent around $9.50 for the Strawberry Mango Tea with lychee and mango jelly at 75% sweetness. It was super delicious and not too sweet. Although, I ordered thinking it would be like an actual tea, but it looked more like slush. 10/10 would recommend and will be coming anytime I'm in this area!
Very good boba.

I came in here with my sister on a Saturday night. Service was fast and staff were very friendly. We ordered three drinks to try and everything was great:

The Strawberry Tornado did not taste artificial, the rose in Rose Oolong milk tea wasn’t overpowering (have had at other establishments where it’s like drinking perfume), and we liked how strong the tea was in the Jasmine milk tea with milk foam.

We would come back here again if in Charlotte.
Good
Love the place Fter trying so many!
Great staff. Nice and accommodating. I had the Brown Sugar Milk Swirl. Best decision ever, for my first time.

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking
review_questions.Recommended dishes: Organic Matcha Slush 22oz, Mocha Latte, Ube Slush 22oz

reviews_data.review_text: So glad they opened here. Love the teas.
Awesome little place. Friendly staff. Tried Brown Sugar Milk Swirl here - tasted great.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Mango Tornado, Strawberry Milk Swirl, Strawberry Tornado

reviews_data.review_text: super cute and friendly workers
this place is awesome, great drinks and comfy aesthetic with good music!
Delicious! Hard to find rose tea and they have it! Wonderful experience and treat!
Delicious!!! I’m hooked!
milk chacha has been my favorite go to boba place for a while now:) i recommend the earl grey milk tea! so glad they opened up this location
Tasty local Bobba teas in many flavors and textures!
This is my fav place for bubble tea 🧋 I would highly recommend ❤️
Amazing!

This is my favorite bubble tea shop in Charlotte. They use fresh ingredients and real fruit. They have oat and coconut milk alternatives for people who can’t have whole milk. The staff are very friendly and get drinks out quickly.
Taro with Oreo is definitely the one you shoulda try.
Great drinks and service y'all!
We came here because my son wanted to try Boba Tea. Great service/staff and so many options! My son loved the chocolate boba tea!
I love it
Great authentic boba tea. Also great place to hang out and play some games as they has several board/card games.
Absolute perfection!! They’ve done it again and again. Milk Cha-Cha uses the best stuff to make these drinks - wish I could get my hands on the fresh tea leaves they use!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Jennifer, I apologize for your bad experience. If you can please email us at milkchachaclt2@gmail.com, we'd love to make it right for you and help us identify the employees who were not attentive. Again, we apologize. This is something that shouldn't have happened. We look forward to hearing from you. Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: Lots of people were on their phones and I had to wait a long time before someone came to the register to help me. My mango drink also tasted like it was expired.
Yummy boba teas and great service!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Lychee Green Tea w Lychee Jelly 22oz

reviews_data.review_text: Super cute place! Drinks are delicious and the employees are helpful and super nice! Will definitely be coming back again
everyone was so friendly, the workers were amazing! good atmosphere and plenty of great drinks. would definitely recommend ☺️
Wei is awesome! :3
Visited twice since they open. My fav boba tea in Charlotte, nice and clean
A great place for bubble tea and all other drinks in the area. Would recommend!
Are you kidding?!?!...this place is awesome.  Love the vibe, people and tea!  Mango tea is the best pick-me-up for a tough day.  Love it.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Organic Matcha Slush 22oz, Peach Green Tea w Aloe 22oz, Strawberry Milk Swirl

reviews_data.review_text: I didn’t even know what bubble tea was until my wife dragged me there. But now I’m hooked! Love the fresh fruit teas and the insta wall! A must for anyone looking for good, authentic, bubble tea!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Charlotte! Thank you for your feedback and i apologize for your bad experience. Can you please email us at milkchachaclt2@gmail.com and we can help get you a free replacement order? We will definitely look into this concern to help improve your and other customer's experiences in the future! Thank you for your feedback and thank you for supporting local! =]
reviews_data.review_text: The cups were cute and so was the location. But the experience was disappointing. When I came inside, all the employees were on their phones and I was told they used fresh mangoes, but they tasted old and were a dark yellow. The drinks I got tasted alright, but nothing to drive 30 minutes for like I did. Not worth it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the awesome review And support Jackie!
reviews_data.review_text: One of my favorite boba spots in CLT!

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text: I can't believe they are opening one in Ballantyne! Same awesome flavor and fresh tasting. Definitely try Mango Turnado adding some crystal bubbles! I can have it every day.
Great tasting boba and gato slush is bomb!! Jesus loves y’all:)
Great service and great tasting boba!

I stopped by today, 08-13-23, when another business nearby that I planned to patronize has a short wait time. It's hot outside, which was a good reason to try something new.

I was greeted as soon as I walked in. Not sure if I smelled tea, but whatever the aroma was smelled good. I'd already previewed the menu while in my car, but Arnan (name on receipt) walked over and handed me a menu. I couldn't decide between the pineapple green tea and the pineapple yakult. He helped me pick the yakult & asked if I was ok with the normal sweetness level.

My drink came out right away. I was also greeted as I exited. Great service goes a long way. Sure I'll visit again.
Amazing boba and tea flavor
Mina helped me customize my drink and was very friendly! :D
Mina was great help! The Hong Kong milk tea is delicious. :)
Mina was excellent!  The drinks at milk cha cha tasted great!
Delicious tea and lots of options.
Awesome
It was so good and the workers were super cool. 🥰

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! We are so glad you liked our boba! =]
reviews_data.review_text: So friendly, best boba I’ve ever had.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for your awesome review!
reviews_data.review_text: Drink looks beautiful and tasted delicious!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for your awesome review!
reviews_data.review_text: A nice place with great service. Highly recommend the mango fruit tea.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text:
This is a delicious milk tea location and if you don't like the tapioca pearls in your drink, they will leave them out.
They are friendly and willing to make suggestions, offering explanations and sometimes have some samples.
The Brown Sugar Mocha was a nice refreshing drink with a nice rich flavor. Stir your drink well. That's important.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: one of the best boba shop in charlotte

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Awesome place! One of the best boba I’ve had in a while

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: People are nice in this place , had patience to explain the things and choosing the tea . I would recommend this place .

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Boba tea and service is AMAZING.  Guys were super helpful. Personally, I am not a big fan of super clean and empty rooms. Not very cozy, and very echoey. Good stuff nonetheless!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: definitely love milk cha-cha!! Highly recommend to everyone

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Ordered a grapefruit tea and HK milk tea, very fresh and tasty!! So glad we have it in the Rea Farm! Will definitely come back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: It’s the best milk tea in CLT in terms of the quality and taste. Happy to see they now have one closer to me.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Best milk tea in Charlotte! Love the authentic tea flavor.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: best fruity bubble tea in town! high recommend

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: This is my go-to boba tea store, and I can't stop raving about their Fresh Mango tea! The authentic taste of ripe mangoes blended perfectly with the creamy milk and chewy boba pearls. It's like a tropical vacation in a cup! The freshness and quality of their ingredients really shine through in every sip, making it a delightful treat on a hot day. the boba pearls were cooked to perfection, with just the right amount of sweetness. If you're a mango lover, you absolutely must try this drink, you won't be disappointed!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text:
I'm thrilled that this place is conveniently located close by!
I ordered the HK milk tea with boba, and it was incredibly delicious. The boba pearls were just the right texture—chewy and soft—with a delightful hint of sweetness. The service was impressively fast, and the store was impeccably clean and spacious.
I'm eagerly looking forward to returning and exploring more of their delightful flavors!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: best 704 milk tea!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Actually a really nice place to go, a large variety of teas, milk shakes, slushes, you can substitute regular milk for organic soy milk in any drink. Toppings like bobas, jelly, Oreos, etc. Many options are unsweetened, or you can choose if you want sugar in it, at least half of choices can be unsweetened. There's a restroom, a few tables and a bar table with bar chairs. No food, drinks only. Prices are reasonable, nice cups, very good presentation, feel like we will be often visitors.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Congrats for the new location , Best milktea store in Charlotte.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Very good, very fresh

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!

reviews_data.review_text:
MilkChacha never disappoints! Their tea is so flavorful and you can really tell they use high-quality ingredients. The tea base tastes fresh and authentic, not watered down like some other places.

They’re also super generous with toppings — every sip had plenty of boba and add-ons. Everything was cooked perfectly and tasted fresh.

If you’re a bubble tea lover, this place is definitely worth trying. Great drinks, great quality, and always consistent!
Great little spot. Never tried Boba before and it was so good. The two girls working tonight were so sweet. Highly recommend.
Absolutely delicious boba tea! My typical go to is the mango yakult with strawberry popping boba at 50% sweetness, but I've never been disappointed with anything I've ordered!

Boba was good.
We went like 2 minutes before closing.
Folks were kind enough to make us few drinks.
Thanks to them.
Trying to order thru their web. But it won't allow it or let me. Did it once I don't want to use Dd or postmaster or any other website than theirs. Ugh
The Hong Kong Milk Tea was straight up tea and nothing more.  It had no taste.  A true watered down disappointment!
A very disappointing experience. I ordered a hot black sesame latte and it was basically milk. They also up-charged for it to be hot, only for my drink to be lukewarm. Lukewarm milk and no boba.😞
Not interested in card only businesses.
The Brown Sugar Milk Swirl is amazing. It is consistently good and my drink is always made extremely fast!
So upset from this experience. For the size of the cup there was barely any boba or enough brown sugar syrup. It was basically milk with a slight flavour. And I drove far out to get there. Do better!

these kids working here didn’t let my 8month pregnant self use the bathroom….?? Saying it’s for employees only? Hello use common sense you’re serving food and drinks you need to let people use the bathroom!!! And after telling you I’m pregnant? Pls retrain with common sense!!!

been here 10ish times, authentic rich tea, fav boba (soaked in brown sugar & chewy), vast & best fruit tea variety (trust, ik), option to pay for extra matcha or ube scoops, and favs are rose oolong tea (not milk tea) and ube latte.

Just went in and experienced terrible customer service. Was placing an order for 3 drinks and one had a sesame and peanut allergy so I simply asked them if that was ok and she said “I think so” and I said are you 100% sure that there will be no cross contamination with anything and they simply shrugged and said “no I can’t be sure.” Then I asked if they could possibly contact a manager to ask (either by text or phone call because a manager was not present in store) and they said they couldn’t. Then, to clarify (because I wasn’t sure if it was a matter of the employees just not understanding), I asked if they could just use new utensils and a new blender when making the drink with allergies and again they shrugged and said no. The employee was genuinely just being so rude and held an attitude the whole. The drinks were good tho but we had to cancel the order with allergies.
got the taro milk tea and it was delicious! staff was super friendly. also we won at the claw machine and it was a really fun experience.
Really good boba! Nice and kind workers
We asked for 25% sugar, but it seemed like the flavor was also cut to 25%. Both of our drinks tasted like watered down milk with a hint of tea flavor. Very disappointed ☹️
Easy and good. Nice staff.
They gypped me on the flavor/syrup. Just served me a glass of milk with boba. Ordered the mango milk swirl tea, and barely got a single sip of very mild mango flavor. Disgusting.
Best Bobah in Charlotte!!! Taro slush is amazing and Hong Kong !!

The drinks was tasty, and the kids liked it, but there was an unpleasant situation — the kids weren’t given $7 in change because like they have a rule that they don’t give change. It felt like they were deceived, which is very unfair and mean, especially towards children. Please pay attention to such behavior and make sure this doesn’t happen again!

The boba here is really hard, maybe it’s been frozen and thawed too many times over but I didn’t like it I kept spitting it out to see if there was something hard or crunchy in the pearls. The milk tea flavors are strong and good but this last time I noticed it was a little watered down, even though I get it with no ice. That’s not really a big deal though my biggest problem was the hard boba balls. There was yellow crust inside of one and I saved it to take a picture but I can’t find it. I did take a cute picture here at least!

Boba saved my life. Thats right you’re reading this correctly. The lady who works the front desk, her name was Alessa if I remember correctly, saved my life. I was comatose in my bed for 5 months then woke up by sheer miracle. There was only one thing on my mind: I have to get boba. I drove around aimlessly with no purpose in life, until, I FOUND THE BOBA JOINT FROM MY DREAMS!!! This waitress has a poetry in motion!!!!!!!!!! DRINKS 10/10 BOBA 10/10 Ever since I have been waking up with excitement everyday, the sparkle has returned to my eye, all thanks to the kind lady working the boba shop, Alessa. 🧋🧋🧋

The drinks were tasty but the boba pearls were hard and chewy. To me, boba is a part of the experience and has to be good. The service was good. There is like two tables in the store and may be a table for two outside. The store was pretty clean.
All the drinks tasted great except for the Thai Milk tea. It was strongly flavored Thai Tea. Had the boba been softer, this place would have been one of my favorites.
They have really good Boba
As always, the best brown sugar boba milk I've ever had, and trust me, I've tried a lot.

I had a terrible experience today with the staff . Vania was extremely unpleasant in her attitude and approach. She was very standoffish and downright aggressive and rude which resulted in me never wanting to go to this establishment which I had looked forward to daily . You lost a long time customer . I asked for a refund as I no longer felt comfortable in our interactions she proceeded to give me the wrong email which I had her write down so that I could not contact owners to receive refund . I would like ownership to call me regarding my experience today.

Great boba place in the South Charlotte area! Highly recommend the Hong Kong Milk Tea. The packaging is very cute and convenient to carry on the go. Location is also convenient and accessible. The claw machine looks like fun and there is a lot of cute merch on display for sale. Service is fast and extremely welcoming. The menu is very diverse and varied.

Amazing boba, and this is my favorite boba place along with Gong Cha :) The decor is cute and fun, and the boba has lots of interesting add ins and flavors!! There is also a fun claw machine to get plushies and you can also buy plushies as well. I got the mango tornado with lychee jelly and it tasted great!! ☺️
Best Boba around. My children love this place, playing uno, exploding kittens, Jenga, or listening to the music. Even has a claw machine!

Customer service was terrible. They charge extra for boba and put very little boba in the cups we ordered, and when I asked for extra boba, the lady said she would need to charge extra for it while she had already charged for the little boba that she put in our cups to begin with. I have never had that experience in any other boba place. I didn’t appreciate the exchange and won’t be going here again. Highly recommend you find yourself another place where they don’t nickel and dime you.
Great place to spend time and hang out! Love the mango matcha latte it’s absolutely amazing!

reviews_data.review_text: super cute and friendly workers
this place is awesome, great drinks and comfy aesthetic with good music!
Delicious! Hard to find rose tea and they have it! Wonderful experience and treat!
Delicious!!! I’m hooked!
milk chacha has been my favorite go to boba place for a while now:) i recommend the earl grey milk tea! so glad they opened up this location
Tasty local Bobba teas in many flavors and textures!
This is my fav place for bubble tea 🧋 I would highly recommend ❤️
Amazing!

This is my favorite bubble tea shop in Charlotte. They use fresh ingredients and real fruit. They have oat and coconut milk alternatives for people who can’t have whole milk. The staff are very friendly and get drinks out quickly.
Taro with Oreo is definitely the one you shoulda try.
Great drinks and service y'all!
We came here because my son wanted to try Boba Tea. Great service/staff and so many options! My son loved the chocolate boba tea!
I love it
Great authentic boba tea. Also great place to hang out and play some games as they has several board/card games.
Absolute perfection!! They’ve done it again and again. Milk Cha-Cha uses the best stuff to make these drinks - wish I could get my hands on the fresh tea leaves they use!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Jennifer, I apologize for your bad experience. If you can please email us at milkchachaclt2@gmail.com, we'd love to make it right for you and help us identify the employees who were not attentive. Again, we apologize. This is something that shouldn't have happened. We look forward to hearing from you. Thank you!
reviews_data.review_text: Lots of people were on their phones and I had to wait a long time before someone came to the register to help me. My mango drink also tasted like it was expired.
Yummy boba teas and great service!

reviews_data.review_text: Super cute place! Drinks are delicious and the employees are helpful and super nice! Will definitely be coming back again
everyone was so friendly, the workers were amazing! good atmosphere and plenty of great drinks. would definitely recommend ☺️
Wei is awesome! :3
Visited twice since they open. My fav boba tea in Charlotte, nice and clean
A great place for bubble tea and all other drinks in the area. Would recommend!
Are you kidding?!?!...this place is awesome.  Love the vibe, people and tea!  Mango tea is the best pick-me-up for a tough day.  Love it.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Organic Matcha Slush 22oz, Peach Green Tea w Aloe 22oz, Strawberry Milk Swirl

reviews_data.review_text: I didn’t even know what bubble tea was until my wife dragged me there. But now I’m hooked! Love the fresh fruit teas and the insta wall! A must for anyone looking for good, authentic, bubble tea!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Charlotte! Thank you for your feedback and i apologize for your bad experience. Can you please email us at milkchachaclt2@gmail.com and we can help get you a free replacement order? We will definitely look into this concern to help improve your and other customer's experiences in the future! Thank you for your feedback and thank you for supporting local! =]
reviews_data.review_text: The cups were cute and so was the location. But the experience was disappointing. When I came inside, all the employees were on their phones and I was told they used fresh mangoes, but they tasted old and were a dark yellow. The drinks I got tasted alright, but nothing to drive 30 minutes for like I did. Not worth it.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the awesome review And support Jackie!
reviews_data.review_text: One of my favorite boba spots in CLT!

reviews_data.review_text: I can't believe they are opening one in Ballantyne! Same awesome flavor and fresh tasting. Definitely try Mango Turnado adding some crystal bubbles! I can have it every day.
Great tasting boba and gato slush is bomb!! Jesus loves y’all:)
Great service and great tasting boba!

I stopped by today, 08-13-23, when another business nearby that I planned to patronize has a short wait time. It's hot outside, which was a good reason to try something new.

I was greeted as soon as I walked in. Not sure if I smelled tea, but whatever the aroma was smelled good. I'd already previewed the menu while in my car, but Arnan (name on receipt) walked over and handed me a menu. I couldn't decide between the pineapple green tea and the pineapple yakult. He helped me pick the yakult & asked if I was ok with the normal sweetness level.

My drink came out right away. I was also greeted as I exited. Great service goes a long way. Sure I'll visit again.
Amazing boba and tea flavor
Mina helped me customize my drink and was very friendly! :D
Mina was great help! The Hong Kong milk tea is delicious. :)
Mina was excellent!  The drinks at milk cha cha tasted great!
Delicious tea and lots of options.
Awesome
It was so good and the workers were super cool. 🥰

This is a delicious milk tea location and if you don't like the tapioca pearls in your drink, they will leave them out.
They are friendly and willing to make suggestions, offering explanations and sometimes have some samples.
The Brown Sugar Mocha was a nice refreshing drink with a nice rich flavor. Stir your drink well. That's important.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: This is my go-to boba tea store, and I can't stop raving about their Fresh Mango tea! The authentic taste of ripe mangoes blended perfectly with the creamy milk and chewy boba pearls. It's like a tropical vacation in a cup! The freshness and quality of their ingredients really shine through in every sip, making it a delightful treat on a hot day. the boba pearls were cooked to perfection, with just the right amount of sweetness. If you're a mango lover, you absolutely must try this drink, you won't be disappointed!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text:
I'm thrilled that this place is conveniently located close by!
I ordered the HK milk tea with boba, and it was incredibly delicious. The boba pearls were just the right texture—chewy and soft—with a delightful hint of sweetness. The service was impressively fast, and the store was impeccably clean and spacious.
I'm eagerly looking forward to returning and exploring more of their delightful flavors!

reviews_data.review_text: best 704 milk tea!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks so much for this awesome review! I'm so glad you enjoyed our drinks!
reviews_data.review_text: Actually a really nice place to go, a large variety of teas, milk shakes, slushes, you can substitute regular milk for organic soy milk in any drink. Toppings like bobas, jelly, Oreos, etc. Many options are unsweetened, or you can choose if you want sugar in it, at least half of choices can be unsweetened. There's a restroom, a few tables and a bar table with bar chairs. No food, drinks only. Prices are reasonable, nice cups, very good presentation, feel like we will be often visitors.
